items.title: Amasty Multiple Extension Vulnerabilities (including one critical RCE)
items.summary: Sansec reported a massive security release for 25 Amasty extensions, with at least one critical vulnerability leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Unauthenticated File Upload in Amasty Order Attributes for Magento
items.summary: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload flaw in Amasty Order Attributes allows attackers to write executable files to a Magento store without logging in, potentially leading to remote code execution.

items.title: Critical vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer for Magento (Unauthenticated PHP object injection)
items.summary: Sansec discovered an unauthenticated PHP object injection vulnerability in Mirasvit Cache Warmer, allowing remote code execution via a crafted cookie without authentication.

items.title: Security update available for Adobe Commerce
items.summary: Adobe released a security update addressing multiple critical, important, and moderate vulnerabilities in Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source, which could lead to unauthorized access, remote code execution, and service disruption.

items.title: Critical Security Update: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source
items.summary: Adobe released a critical security update for Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source to address multiple vulnerabilities that could allow attackers to bypass security controls and gain escalated privileges.
